decks.notes: The deck focuses on utilizing Lotus Field to generate massive amounts of mana quickly, allowing for explosive plays with cards like Scapeshift and Lumra, Bellow of the Woods. It also includes a variety of lands and support cards to protect and enable the combo, as well as alternative win conditions like Thassa's Oracle and Marang River Regent. The deck aims to ramp up quickly, control the board with land manipulation, and ultimately win through either overwhelming force or a well-timed combo finish.

This deck focuses on quickly assembling the Greasefang Parhelion combo to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence. It includes cards that can disrupt the opponent's strategy like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize, while also providing protection with Iron-Shield Elf and Sheltered by Ghosts. The deck utilizes lands like Godless Shrine and Geier Reach Sanitarium to help cast the combo pieces effectively. Monument to Endurance and Parhelion II are key components of the combo, alongside Greasefang, Okiba Boss, to generate substantial value and finish off the opponent swiftly.

The main concept of this Boros Control deck is to establish board control and disrupt the opponent's strategy through removal spells, board wipes, and land destruction. The deck also focuses on generating card advantage and value through cards like The Wandering Emperor and Price of Freedom. By combining control elements with incremental advantage, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a grindy game. Additionally, the inclusion of Kaheera as a companion provides an additional source of value and synergy with the rest of the deck.

The deck focuses on utilizing the combo between Greasefang and Parhelion II to overwhelm the opponent. It includes ways to protect the combo pieces with Boseiju, Who Endures and Formidable Speaker, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Collective Brutality. The deck also includes various support cards like Esika's Chariot and Overlord of the Balemurk to generate value and pressure the opponent. The goal is to assemble the combo pieces quickly and efficiently to close out the game before the opponent can respond.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence through a combination of low-cost Spirit creatures and mana acceleration, while also utilizing cards like Essence Flux to protect key creatures and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent while maintaining control of the battlefield, ultimately leading to a victory through a combination of aggression and tempo play. The inclusion of powerful spirits like Starfield Shepherd and Haliya, Guided by Light emphasizes the importance of flying creatures and synergistic abilities to secure wins.

The focus of this deck is to establish board control and pressure the opponent with a combination of efficient removal spells and evasive creatures. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with hand disruption effects like Thoughtseize and push through damage with evasive threats like Moon-Circuit Hacker and Faerie Miscreant. The inclusion of cards like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse and Bitter Triumph also provide additional ways to control the battlefield and finish off the opponent. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive game plan while ensuring consistency in casting spells.

This deck focuses on assembling the Greasefang Parhelion combo to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and synergy. The deck includes various support cards to help search for key pieces, protect your board, and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By efficiently ramping up and setting up the combo, the deck aims to create an overwhelming board presence and deal significant damage in a short amount of time, making it difficult for the opponent to recover.

The key concept of this deck is to utilize Lotus Field as a key piece in a combo strategy, focusing on ramping up mana quickly and efficiently to cast powerful spells like Scapeshift and Terror of the Peaks. The deck also includes cards like Arboreal Grazer and Port of Karfell to further ramp up mana production. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Boseiju, Who Endures and Kenrith, the Returned King adds flexibility and versatility to the deck, allowing for various win conditions and strategies to be employed.

The deck focuses on using control elements to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining board presence with creatures like Sentinel of the Nameless City. It also includes cards like Thoughtseize and Duress to remove key cards from the opponent's hand. The deck also utilizes The Rock archetype with cards like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse and Witherbloom Charm to generate value and control the game. Overall, the deck aims to out value the opponent and control the game until it can win with its own threats.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly putting pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Veteran Motorist, Toolcraft Exemplar, and Magda, Brazen Outlaw. It also includes cards like Torch the Tower and Embercleave to deal direct damage and finish off opponents. The deck utilizes cards like Smuggler's Copter and Voyager Glidecar for additional card advantage and evasion. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and relentless assault, utilizing a mix of creatures, removal, and equipment to secure victories.

This aggro deck focuses on utilizing cheap and efficient spells to deal damage quickly to the opponent. Cards like Burst Lightning, Reckless Rage, and Stormchaser's Talent help to control the board and push through damage. Monastery Swiftspear, Emberheart Challenger, and Soul-Scar Mage provide aggressive creatures that can quickly lower the opponent's life total. The deck also includes card draw and selection spells like Sleight of Hand and Academic Dispute to maintain tempo and find key cards. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive game plan.

This deck focuses on quickly attacking the opponent with a combination of cheap, aggressive creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to apply constant pressure on the opponent while using spells like Scorching Shot and Torch the Tower to remove any blockers or threats. With a mix of creatures that can provide card advantage like Vivi Ornitier and Stormchaser's Talent, as well as powerful finishers like Kid Loki and Fear of Missing Out, this deck aims to win the game quickly before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

This deck focuses on a combination of controlling the board with removal spells like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay, while also utilizing powerful creatures like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse and Graveyard Trespasser to apply pressure. The key strategy is to disrupt the opponent's game plan with hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize, while also ramping into big threats with cards like Mutavault and Boseiju, Who Endures. By controlling the board and out-valuing the opponent, this deck aims to grind out wins through resource management and strategic play.

This deck focuses on aggressively dealing damage to your opponent as quickly as possible. Utilizing a mix of powerful creatures like Soul-Scar Mage and Monastery Swiftspear, along with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage, the goal is to apply consistent pressure and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize. The inclusion of utility lands like Den of the Bugbear and Ramunap Ruins provide additional reach, while cards like Monstrous Rage and The Legend of Roku help push through damage. The deck aims to be fast, efficient, and relentless in its pursuit of victory.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent using cheap spells and creatures with prowess abilities. By utilizing cards like Monastery Swiftspear, Soul-Scar Mage, and Emberheart Challenger, along with cards like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage, the deck aims to control the board and win the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. The deck also includes cards like Academic Dispute and Experimental Synthesizer to provide card draw and additional versatility in combat.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy focused on generating green mana and creatures with high devotion to green. By utilizing cards like Nykthos, Shrine to Nyx and Nature's Rhythm, the deck can quickly ramp up its resources and play impactful threats like Craterhoof Behemoth and The Great Henge. With strong creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, the deck aims to establish board presence early and maintain pressure throughout the game. The inclusion of powerful finishers like Shang-Chi, Master of Kung Fu and Titan of Industry ensures that the deck can close out games efficiently.
